name: Minesweeper
description: Reveal the grid without detonating a mine. Long-press to flag.

name: Drop & Merge
description: Drop numbered tiles into columns. Match values to merge them upward.

name: Pulsepath
description: Draw a live wire route, tag relays, and return to the core at the right moment to fire the board.

name: Brick Breaker
description: Classic paddle-and-ball brick breaking with lives, levels, and a couple of simple drops.

name: Sky Hop
description: A doodle-jump-style endless hopper with moving ledges, springs, and crumble traps.
